docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CULPEPPER BESSIE AS TO DEFENDANT SPENCER MONROE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
INVALID SERVICE AS TO MONROE SPENCER, NO MAILING DONE ON SUBSERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-09-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO SEP-23-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CULPEPPER BESSIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPENCER MONROE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $33.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,033.00, DEF TO DELIVER FURNITURE TO PLFT AT 674 GROVE ON OR BEFORE 10/23/92 IF NOT DONE DEF OWES $5000. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
